steps.code: <?php require_once('/wordpress/wp-load.php'); $content = '<!-- wp:repo-pop/repository {"repoUrl":"https://github.com/WordPress/gutenberg"} /-->'; $existing = get_page_by_path('repo-pop-demo'); $post = array('post_title' => 'Repo Pop Demo', 'post_name' => 'repo-pop-demo', 'post_type' => 'page', 'post_status' => 'publish', 'post_content' => $content); if ($existing) { $post['ID'] = $existing->ID; wp_update_post($post); } else { wp_insert_post($post); } update_option('permalink_structure', '/%postname%/'); flush_rewrite_rules();
